modules.name: C# Language Fundamentals
modules.description: Introduction to the C# programming language and .NET platform. Covers environment setup, language syntax, data types, variables, console I/O, strings, control flow, methods, arrays, and a capstone project building a task manager application.

lessons.title: Introduction to C#
topics: Overview of the C# language and .NET platform

lessons.title: Hello World
topics: Writing and running your first C# program

lessons.title: C# Application Overview
topics: Top-level statements vs traditional Main method

lessons.title: Types
topics: The var keyword and type inference

lessons.title: Console I/O
topics: Parsing user input to numeric types

lessons.title: Task Manager Project
topics: Capstone project combining all module concepts
Building a console-based task manager application
Applying types, variables, strings, control flow, methods, and arrays

assessment.title: Capsule Hotel Assessment
items: Build a capsule hotel management console application
Demonstrate proficiency in C# language fundamentals
Apply variables, types, strings, conditionals, loops, methods, and arrays
Implement user interaction through console I/O
Organize code using methods and proper structure
